acceptance_criteria: All requirements have non-null category and type fields
Stale in-progress tasks are flagged after configurable inactivity threshold
Priority distribution policy is documented and optionally enforced
Automated test coverage for data quality checks
description: Data quality improvements for tasks and requirements. COMPLETED: TASK-048 backfilled missing category/type on requirements. TASK-049 added stale in-progress task detection. TASK-056 re-calibrated task priority distribution (resolved the 55% high-priority inflation). REMAINING: TASK-055 (ready) — audit and decide on unused OrchestratorTask fields (estimated_effort, impact_area, risk, scope, complexity, resource_requirements): expose via CLI flags or remove.
title: Improve data quality and hygiene across tasks and requirements
